title: Whats the Best EVA Weapon
wikitext:
[]: What's the Best EVA Weapon?             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Tue Feb 12, 2008 3:20 pm I want to know everyone's favorite weapon. Please note, the Lance of Longinus does not count. Why? Because it sucks, it penetrates all ATFs. So if you put that, get a new weapon. I personally like my idea of the Prog Sword, but if you won't count it, the Utility Knife is my favorite actual weapon.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Feb 12, 2008 4:11 pm The Evas natural godly powers that NERV goes to great links to surpress. Just look at the way Yui WTFPWNED poor Zer.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Feb 12, 2008 6:18 pm other than the LoL, the positron rifle in Operation Yashima (go see episode six to know wtf I am talking about, all you n00bs)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Feb 12, 2008 7:29 pm The Eva's mouth It tore Unit-02 and Zer to shreads.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Feb 13, 2008 7:20 am By the effectiveness it has to be prog knife

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:31 pm The Magoroxx (or whatever the official Romanization is) Sword -- think progressive katana.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Feb 13, 2008 1:58 pm The best Eva weapon is a pilot with vis head screwed on straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Feb 13, 2008 2:03 pm You mean an Eva that doesn't need a pilot right?

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Wed Feb 13, 2008 3:14 pm BobBQ wrote: The best Eva weapon is a pilot with vis head screwed on straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Feb 13, 2008 3:50 pm The dark green rifle that Rei uses against Leliel and Armisael. I always thought that looked the coolest of all the Eva weapons. Someone should post that picture of 01 kneeling with all the weaponry from the show laid out around it on the ground.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Feb 13, 2008 5:10 pm Zugzwang wrote: The dark green rifle that Rei uses against Leliel and Armisael. I always thought that looked the coolest of all the Eva weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by Logan Payne » Wed Feb 13, 2008 5:17 pm Easy: Sho's hands. rip your FACE OFF. Break your neck. Rip out your entry plug and crush it without fail. P.S. Lance is a good thing to disqualify 'cause I woulda picked it to.

[]:             Quote Post by RandomStuff » Wed Feb 13, 2008 8:39 pm Prog Sword [or whatever it's called, double chainsaw Though if we have to pick stuff they actually use I'd say the Eva assault rifle and the good ol' prog knife

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Feb 13, 2008 9:11 pm BobBQ wrote: Zugzwang wrote: The dark green rifle that Rei uses against Leliel and Armisael. I always thought that looked the coolest of all the Eva weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 16, 2008 10:46 am Kids, kids. There is no such thing as a "progressive sword". There are, however, the Magorox and the Countersword (they form a set). Also, AEF's post wins.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Sat Feb 16, 2008 11:44 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: other than the LoL, the positron rifle in Operation Yashima (go see episode six to know wtf I am talking about, all you n00bs)

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Feb 16, 2008 11:51 am Berserk mode… like it, as it augments the Eva from not just a biological weapon, but to a CRZY biological weapon

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Feb 16, 2008 1:31 pm The please no rebuild spoilers outside of the rebuild forum , i might not have done much to the angel but its damned cool anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 16, 2008 2:36 pm Please watch the Rebuild spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Sun Feb 17, 2008 11:07 pm I say the progressive plane that split israfel in half. second is the prog knife. if we're talking about fantasy weapons...maybe a progressive spear or a rod with two ends that are progressive (blunt weapon). if you have a progressive rod with a high sync ratio, you could seriously damage a lot of stuff...seriously.
summary:
[]: What's the Best EVA Weapon?             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Tue Feb 12, 2008 3:20 pm I want to know everyone's favorite weapon. Please note, the Lance of Longinus does not count. Why? Because it sucks, it penetrates all ATFs. So if you put that, get a new weapon. I personally like my idea of the Prog Sword, but if you won't count it, the Utility Knife is my favorite actual weapon.
